title: Behemoths Cataclysm
description: This mod aims to add Behemoth's Pandemonium Curses for L_Ender's Cataclysm.
body:
### This mod aims to add Behemoth's Pandemonium Curses for L\_Ender's Cataclysm.

This addon introduces powerful **Pandemonium Curses** into the world.

If Cataclysm was already dangerous, this makes it apocalyptic.


**This mod requires the following dependencies:**

[![alt text](https://media.forgecdn.net/avatars/thumbnails/460/870/64/64/637739722679428303.png)](https://modrinth.com/mod/l_enders-cataclysm) 3.16 or above.
[![alt text](https://media.forgecdn.net/avatars/thumbnails/1663/289/64/64/639059158083147434.png)](https://modrinth.com/mod/behemoths) 1.1.0.0 or above.


---

## Pandemonium Curses

Pandemonium Curses modify specific Cataclysm entities, making battles more chaotic and unforgiving.

### Cataclysmic Path
- All Cataclysmic bosses gain a **30% chance to critically strike**
- Critical strikes deal **130% damage**

### Koboleton Horde
- Koboletons now spawn in significantly larger groups
- 15% chance for a Koboleton to transform into a Wadjet

### The Deep Tidal Wave
- Deepling species spawn with reinforcements
- Increased movement speed for all Deeplings

### Deepling Ascension
- 15% chance for Deeplings to spawn as a Deepling Priest
- Deepling Priests constantly heal nearby Deepling species

---
